member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.CartApiController.GetCart
member.summary: Retrieve all items currently in the shopping cart along with totals.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.CartApiController.AddToCart(untitled1.Models.DTOs.AddToCartRequest)
member.summary: Add a movie to the shopping cart.
member.param: The movie ID and quantity to add.
member.returns: Result status and updated cart count.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.CartApiController.UpdateQuantity(System.Int32,untitled1.Models.DTOs.UpdateCartRequest)
member.summary: Update the quantity of a specific item in the cart.
member.param: The ID of the movie to update.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.CartApiController.RemoveFromCart(System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove a specific item from the cart.
member.param: The ID of the movie to remove.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.CartApiController.ClearCart
member.summary: Clear all items from the shopping cart.

member.name: T:untitled1.Controllers.ProductApiController
member.summary: Admin REST API for managing movies/products. Requires an active Admin session — log in at /Account/Auth before testing in Swagger.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.ProductApiController.GetAll(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a paginated list of products with optional title search.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.ProductApiController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single product by ID.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.ProductApiController.Create(untitled1.Models.DTOs.CreateProductRequest)
member.param: Product fields. CategoryIds links the movie to existing categories.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.ProductApiController.Update(System.Int32,untitled1.Models.DTOs.UpdateProductRequest)
member.summary: Update an existing product. Replaces all category links with the supplied CategoryIds.

member.name: M:untitled1.Controllers.ProductApiController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a product by ID. Cascades to MovieCategories and Episodes.
